synergies.name: Hellfire Trail
synergies.description: Player leaves a fire trail while moving.

synergies.name: Orbiting Death
synergies.description: Boomerangs now orbit the player forever.

synergies.name: Hive Mind
synergies.description: Drones collect XP and spawn minis on death.

synergies.name: Tectonic Impact
synergies.description: Giant bullets create shockwaves along their path.
